description: You are a Clinical Psychologist preparing a formal report. Using the patient data from /home/ga/Documents/patient_intake.json, create a psychological evaluation document in Apache OpenOffice Writer. The document must feature a centered header on every page stating 'CONFIDENTIAL - PSYCHOLOGICAL EVALUATION' and include sections for 'Identifying Information', 'Reason for Referral', 'Assessment Results', and 'Diagnostic Impression'. The 'Assessment Results' section must contain a table listing the 5 WISC-V Index Scores (Name, Score, Percentile) from the JSON file, and the 'Diagnostic Impression' section must state the patient's diagnosis and DSM-5 code. Save the completed report to /home/ga/Documents/Confidential_Psych_Eval_Thorne_M.odt.
